item.title: Django Create Test Fixture Data From Exist Database
item.author: Author
item.description: Command 1 python manage.py dumpdata --exclude contenttypes --exclude auth.permission --exclude authtoken.token -o test_data.json

item.title: Django Create Models From Exist Database
item.author: Author
item.description: Command 1 python manage.py inspectdb > models.py Precautions You need to change something in manually. For example, you have to modify max_length in CharField from -1 to length that you want.
